nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: Brahmagiri (Karnataka)
nodes.summary: Brahmagiri is a mountain range in the Western Ghats of south India.

nodes.name: 印度南部
nodes.summary: 印度南部是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括丛林鹑、Yellow-browed bulbul、灰颈噪鹛，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 尼尔吉里丘陵
nodes.summary: 尼尔吉里丘陵是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括纯色岩燕、灰颈噪鹛、Nilgiri flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灰颈噪鹛
nodes.summary: 灰颈噪鹛（Nilgiri laughingthrush，学名 Montecincla cachinnans），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 瓦亞納德縣
nodes.summary: 瓦亞納德縣是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Greater flameback、白胸噪鹛、灰颈噪鹛，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Jerdon|Jerdon]], 1839) | synonyms = Garrulax cachinnansCrateropus cachinnans protonym | range_map = Montecincla map (2).png | range_map_caption = }} The Nilgiri laughingthrush (Montecincla cachinnans) is a species of laughingthrush endemic to the high elevation areas of the Nilgiris and adjoining hill ranges in Peninsular India

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Jerdon|Jerdon]], 1839) | synonyms = Garrulax cachinnansCrateropus cachinnans protonym | range_map = Montecincla map (2).png | range_map_caption = }} The Nilgiri laughingthrush (Montecincla cachinnans) is a species of laughingthrush endemic to the high elevation areas of the Nilgiris and adjoining hill ranges in Peninsular India

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the past the species was considered to have two subspecies, the nominate form in the Nilgiris (earlier called the black-chinned laughingthrush or rufous-breasted laughingthrush) and jerdoni (which is now treated as a full species, the Banasura laughingthrush) with a grey upper breast and found in the Brahmagiris of Coorg and Banasura range of Wayanad

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the past the species was considered to have two subspecies, the nominate form in the Nilgiris (earlier called the black-chinned laughingthrush or rufous-breasted laughingthrush) and jerdoni (which is now treated as a full species, the Banasura laughingthrush) with a grey upper breast and found in the Brahmagiris of Coorg and Banasura range of Wayanad
